reviews.comment:
En las habitaciones se inundan los baños, la comida es poco sustanciosa y costosa para ser unos platos simples. Para nada recomendable

(Translated by Google)
The rooms flood the bathrooms, and the food is bland and expensive for simple dishes. Not at all recommended.

reviews.comment:
Cordialidad de todos los empleados y el concesionario además  nos dio todas las referencias para seguir nuestro viaje. La habitación impecable.

(Translated by Google)
The staff was friendly, and the dealership provided us with all the information we needed to continue our trip. The room was spotless.
